description:
A GPU-accelerated terminal emulator

Nova is a fast, GPU-accelerated terminal emulator built with Rust and iced.
0.20.0 (2026-05-17)
Features
- add font size keybinds and debounce font resize for performance (94967ce)
- close active split pane on Ctrl/Cmd+W instead of entire tab (24fb272)
- command timing (ae562b5)
- configurable scrollback limit (a6e6a1c)
- ctrl-0 reset font size (878096a)
- implement split pane with active indicator and pane management (8bad7d7)
- notification on completion (95820f3)
- resize handle between split panes (7c8460f)
- search in scrollback (309e0ed)
- tab reordering (91a9973)
Bug Fixes
- address split pane review feedback (236ef18)
- gate Write import behind windows cfg to fix CI clippy (038ad34)
- prevent evoking diagnostic banner on ctrl c (c46ab38)
- search bar layout shift, debounce, accent border, top-right position (b042831)
- use per-cell containers with terminal-level clipping for monospace rendering (440aa01)
Performance Improvements
- debounce window resize to reduce grid alloc and PTY thrash (e27f3bc)
What's Changed
- refactor: split app state by @pmqueiroz in #70
- fix: use per-cell containers with terminal-level clipping for monospace rendering by @pmqueiroz in #72
- feat: implement split pane with active indicator and pane management by @pmqueiroz in #71
- fix: prevent evoking diagnostic banner on ctrl c by @pmqueiroz in #76
- feat: ctrl-0 reset font size by @pmqueiroz in #77
- feat: configurable scrollback limit by @pmqueiroz in #78
- feat: resize handle between split panes by @pmqueiroz in #81
- feat: command timing by @pmqueiroz in #83
- feat: tab reordering by @pmqueiroz in #82
- chore(main): release 0.20.0 by @pmqueiroz in #73
Full Changelog: v0.19.0...v0.20.0
